input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.5.1
            TITLE: adhesive used and referenced bonding strength must be appropriate for both substrate types

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.5.1: Adhesive used and referenced bonding strength must be appropriate for both substrate types
F.5.5.1 Adhesive used and referenced bonding strength must be appropriate for both substrate types

final_answer: Adhesive used and referenced bonding strength must be appropriate for both substrate types
